'''zanoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:squadronmate|squadronmate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:squadronmate|squadronmate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zanoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæneseth|zæneseth]] || [[word:zænesej|zænesej]] || [[word:zænesesh|zænesesh]] || [[word:zænese|zænese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zanonosoth|zanonosoth]] || [[word:zanonosoj|zanonosoj]] || [[word:zanonososh|zanonososh]] || [[word:zanonoso|zanonoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zanosoth|zanosoth]] || [[word:zanosoj|zanosoj]] || [[word:zanososh|zanososh]] || [[word:zanoso|zanoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zanofsoth|zanofsoth]] || [[word:zanofsoj|zanofsoj]] || [[word:zanofsosh|zanofsosh]] || [[word:zanofsof|zanofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zanosotho|zanosotho]] || [[word:zanosojo|zanosojo]] || [[word:zanososho|zanososho]] || [[word:zanosoko|zanosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zanosoth|zanosoth]] || [[word:zanosoj|zanosoj]] || [[word:zanososh|zanososh]] || [[word:zanoso|zanoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zanosothol|zanosothol]] || [[word:zanosojol|zanosojol]] || [[word:zanososhol|zanososhol]] || [[word:zanosokol|zanosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zanosothotho|zanosothotho]] || [[word:zanosojojo|zanosojojo]] || [[word:zanososhosho|zanososhosho]] || [[word:zanosoko|zanosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zanosothon|zanosothon]] || [[word:zanosojon|zanosojon]] || [[word:zanososhon|zanososhon]] || [[word:zanosokon|zanosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zanosothoro|zanosothoro]] || [[word:zanosojoro|zanosojoro]] || [[word:zanososhoro|zanososhoro]] || [[word:zanosokoro|zanosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
